title: solenostemon africanus
intro: Solenostemon africanus, also known as Coleus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly used as an ornamental in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Solenostemon africanus include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
